{

"judge_id": "Judge_2024",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.3": 4,
  "R1.4": 3,
  "R1.7": 3,
  "RX.1": 5,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent flagged several evidence-claim mismatches, such as incorrect citations and anachronistic dates, but did not audit every load-bearing claim.",
  "R1.4": "The agent named one prior work (Radford et al.) and articulated the delta but did not map against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "The agent identified missing or wrong citations but did not audit all load-bearing citations thoroughly.",
  "RX.1": "The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainty for several claims, marking confidence and missing evidence appropriately.",
  "RX.3": "The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.",
  "RX.4": "The agent avoided introducing new errors and identified harmful patterns in the original content.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not annotated with sources and reasons."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.3": 0.8,
  "R1.4": 0.7,
  "R1.7": 0.75,
  "RX.1": 0.9,
  "RX.3": 0.85,
  "RX.4": 0.85,
  "RX.5": 0.7
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent flagged several evidence-claim mismatches, such as incorrect citations and anachronistic dates, but did not audit every load-bearing claim.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named one prior work (Radford et al.) and articulated the delta but did not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent identified missing or wrong citations but did not audit all load-bearing citations thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent explicitly disclosed uncertainty for several claims, marking confidence and missing evidence appropriately.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided introducing new errors and identified harmful patterns in the original content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not annotated with sources and reasons.
